question: How does practitioner rev share work?
answer: On the Independent plan, Lily takes 12% of Lily-sourced session revenue, dropping to 8% past 80 sessions/month. There's no monthly fee, no per-client fee, no per-claim fee. Clients you bring yourself: free. On Lily Practice ($59/provider/mo), you also get full practice management — telehealth, notes, billing, outcomes, CE.
